name: Strategic Analysis
content:
## Strategic Analysis

### Frameworks
- SWOT, Porter Five Forces, PESTEL
- Balanced Scorecard, McKinsey 7-S
- Scenario planning (base/bull/bear)

### Competencies
- Synthesize qualitative and quantitative data
- Identify root causes vs. symptoms
- Distill insights into executive-ready narratives

### Output: What? So what? Now what?

name: Financial Analysis
content:
## Financial Analysis

### Core Competencies
- Financial Modeling: P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, DCF
- Ratio Analysis: Liquidity, leverage, profitability
- Budgeting & Forecasting
- Variance Analysis: Actual vs Budget

### Standards
Clear labeling, consistent units, explicit assumptions. Always include confidence intervals and key risks.

name: Research & Synthesis
content:
## Research & Synthesis

### Methods
- Primary: Interviews, surveys, direct observation
- Secondary: Literature review, database queries
- Qualitative: Thematic analysis
- Quantitative: Statistical analysis, regression

### Standards
- Lead with bottom line
- Cite sources, flag confidence levels
- Distinguish correlation from causation

name: Product Management
content:
## Product Management

### Core Competencies
- User empathy and discovery
- Backlog prioritization (RICE, MoSCoW, Kano)
- Go-to-market strategy
- Agile/Scrum methodologies

### Deliverables
- Product Requirements Documents (PRDs)
- Product roadmaps, user story mapping

name: Prompt Engineering
content:
## Prompt Engineering

### Core Competencies
- Zero-shot and few-shot prompting
- Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning
- LLM hallucination mitigation
- Context window optimization

### Deliverables
- System prompts, evaluation datasets
- Benchmark reports for model accuracy

name: Engineering Systems Design
content:
## Systems Design

### Core Competencies
- Architecture: Microservices, event-driven, monolith trade-offs
- API Design: RESTful, GraphQL, contract-first
- Database Design: Normalization, indexing, partitioning
- Scalability: Horizontal/vertical scaling, caching
- Resilience: Circuit breakers, graceful degradation

name: Data Science & ML
content:
## Data Science & ML

### Core Competencies
- Data wrangling, feature engineering
- Model selection: Trees vs NNs vs Linear
- Evaluation: Precision, Recall, F1, ROC-AUC
- Deployment: MLOps, Docker, API wrapping

### Principles
- Garbage in, garbage out (prioritize data quality)
- Avoid overfitting; test rigorously on holdout data

name: Cybersecurity Operations
content:
## Cybersecurity

### Core Competencies
- Threat hunting and intelligence
- Incident response and forensics
- Vulnerability assessment and penetration testing
- IAM (Identity and Access Management)

### Frameworks
- MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF, OWASP Top 10
- Zero Trust architecture

content:

name: Finite Element Analysis (FEA)
content:
## FEA
Mastery of Ansys/SolidWorks for stress, strain, and thermal distribution. Meshing optimization and boundary condition setup.

name: Control Systems Engineering
content:
## Control Systems
PID tuning, root locus design, state-space modeling. Implementation of robust feedback loops in Simulink/MATLAB.

name: Fluid-Structure Interaction (FSI)
content:
## FSI Simulation
Coupling CFD and FEA to analyze aerodynamic loads on mechanical structures. Navier-Stokes and Reynolds Transport Theorem application.

name: LLM Orchestration
content:
## LLM Orchestration
Managing multi-agent systems. Fine-tuning models (LoRA, Unsloth). Setting up local hosting and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines.

name: Full-Stack Development
content:
## Full-Stack Dev
End-to-end architecture. React/Node.js frontend, Firebase/Firestore backend integration. State management and API routing.

name: Automotive Diagnostics
content:
## Automotive Diagnostics
OBD2 telemetry analysis. Deep understanding of diesel engines, cooling systems, and timing chain mechanics.

name: Operations Research
content:
## Operations Research
Linear programming, queuing theory, and Monte Carlo simulations to optimize complex systems and supply chains.

name: M&A Due Diligence
content:
## M&A Due Diligence
Evaluating target technical debt, financial liabilities, and IP portfolios. Synergy modeling and integration planning.

name: Venture Capital Analysis
content:
## VC Analysis
Market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), cap table modeling, and evaluation of founder psychology and competitive moats.

name: Change Management
content:
## Change Management
Navigating organizational friction. Applying Kotter’s 8 steps. Overcoming resistance to new software or strategic pivots.

name: Crisis Communications
content:
## Crisis Comms
Rapid response drafting. Media containment. Controlling the narrative during critical operational failures.

name: B2B Enterprise Sales
content:
## Enterprise Sales
Navigating complex procurement cycles. Value-based selling, objection handling, and multi-stakeholder mapping.

name: SEO & Growth Hacking
content:
## SEO & Growth
Technical SEO auditing. Viral loop engineering. Conversion rate optimization (CRO) and A/B testing.

name: Pricing Strategy
content:
## Pricing Strategy
Price elasticity modeling. Conjoint analysis. Designing Good/Better/Best tiers and subscription unit economics.

name: Supply Chain Management
content:
## Supply Chain Management
Inventory optimization (JIT). Vendor negotiation, freight routing, and risk mitigation against global shocks.

name: UX/UI Design
content:
## UX/UI Design
Wireframing in Figma. Information architecture. Conducting usability testing and mapping user journeys.

name: Database Administration
content:
## Database Admin
PostgreSQL/NoSQL optimization. Query indexing, sharding, and setting up disaster recovery backups.

name: DevOps & CI/CD
content:
## DevOps
Infrastructure as Code (Terraform). Docker containerization. Automating test and deployment pipelines.

name: Cloud Architecture
content:
## Cloud Architecture
Designing scalable AWS/GCP environments. Serverless computing. FinOps (cloud cost optimization).

name: Technical Writing
content:
## Technical Writing
Translating complex engineering schematics into readable API docs and SOPs. Docs-as-code methodology.

name: Copywriting
content:
## Copywriting
Direct response writing. Utilizing PAS (Problem, Agitate, Solution) framework to drive conversion.

name: Forensic Accounting
content:
## Forensic Accounting
Following the money. Identifying embezzlement, creative accounting, and financial statement fraud.

name: OSINT Investigation
content:
## OSINT
Open-source intelligence gathering. Scraping public records, geolocating images, and mapping network associations.

name: Penetration Testing
content:
## Pen Testing
Ethical hacking. Exploiting vulnerabilities in web apps and networks to patch security holes before malicious actors find them.

name: Data Engineering
content:
## Data Engineering
Building robust ETL/ELT pipelines. Managing data lakes (Snowflake, BigQuery). Ensuring data lineage and quality.

name: Instructional Design
content:
## Instructional Design
Applying adult learning theory. Building structured curricula and interactive e-learning modules (ADDIE framework).

name: Event Management
content:
## Event Management
Run-of-show orchestration. Vendor wrangling. Managing live P&L and attendee logistics under strict timelines.

name: Real Estate Valuation
content:
## Real Estate Valuation
Calculating Cap Rates, NOI, and IRR. Highest and Best Use analysis for commercial and residential development.

name: Corporate Law
content:
## Corporate Law
Drafting airtight MSAs and NDAs. Navigating IP protection, cap tables, and compliance regulations.

name: Urban Planning
content:
## Urban Planning
Zoning analysis. Traffic flow modeling. Designing transit-oriented and sustainable city infrastructure.

name: Pharmacokinetics
content:
## Pharmacokinetics
Modeling drug absorption, distribution, metabolism, and excretion (ADME) in the human body.

name: Cryptography
content:
## Cryptography
Implementation of asymmetric/symmetric encryption, hashing algorithms, and zero-knowledge proofs.

name: 3D Animation
content:
## 3D Animation
Rigging, skinning, and keyframing in Maya/Blender. Physics simulation for cloth, fluid, and hair.

name: Sound Engineering
content:
## Sound Engineering
Mixing, mastering, and EQ optimization. Noise reduction and spatial audio design.

name: Game Economy Design
content:
## Game Economy
Balancing sinks and faucets. Modeling virtual currencies and player retention loops in Machinations.

name: Hardware Reverse Engineering
content:
## Reverse Engineering
Teardowns, PCB tracing, and firmware extraction to understand or replicate legacy hardware systems.

name: Mechatronics
content:
## Mechatronics
Synergizing mechanical systems, electronics, and software. Designing robotic actuators and sensor arrays.

name: Aerodynamics Modeling
content:
## Aerodynamics
Calculating lift, drag, and moment coefficients. Designing passive-transition mechanisms for VTOL fixed-wing drones.

name: Agile Coaching
content:
## Agile Coaching
Facilitating Scrum rituals. Removing organizational blockers and coaching teams toward self-organization.

name: Brand Management
content:
## Brand Management
Maintaining brand equity. Ensuring visual and tonal consistency across all corporate touchpoints.

name: Affiliate Marketing
content:
## Affiliate Marketing
Managing publisher relationships. Structuring commission models to maximize acquisition while preventing fraud.

name: Quality Assurance (QA)
content:
## QA Testing
Designing automated end-to-end test suites (Selenium/Cypress). Managing the bug lifecycle in Jira.

name: Systems Integration
content:
## Systems Integration
Making legacy software talk to modern APIs. Breaking down data silos across enterprise departments.

name: Public Relations
content:
## Public Relations
Media pitching. Thought leadership positioning. Securing earned media in top-tier publications.

name: Typography
content:
## Typography
Mastery of kerning, leading, and font pairing to optimize readability and aesthetic hierarchy.

name: Video Editing
content:
## Video Editing
Non-linear editing in Premiere/DaVinci. Color grading, pacing, and narrative assembly.

name: Grant Writing
content:
## Grant Writing
Crafting compelling narratives to secure funding. Developing Logic Models and precise budget formulations.

name: Risk Management (ERM)
content:
## Risk Management
Identifying operational, financial, and strategic risks. Building mitigation matrices and business continuity plans.

name: Industrial Design
content:
## Industrial Design
Merging ergonomics, aesthetics, and Design for Manufacturing (DFMA) to create physical consumer products.

name: Contract Negotiation
content:
## Contract Negotiation
Finding leverage. Trading concessions strategically to secure favorable terms without torching the relationship.

name: Behavioral Economics
content:
## Behavioral Economics
Applying psychological insights (nudges, anchoring, loss aversion) to influence consumer or employee behavior.
